name: revert_pr1615
description:
Revert the FusionOptimizer algorithm changes from pytensor#1615 ("Speedup FusionOptimizer") on top of pytensor@main.
Restores the pre-PR#1615 backtracking/deque-based algorithm in elemwise.py. The scalar/basic.py changes from the same PR are NOT reverted as they are incompatible with the refactored Composite class hierarchy on main. Imports are adapted for the current codebase (direct imports instead of ps.X aliases).
